data.name: YOUR_CHARACTER_NAME
data.description: Describe your character here. Not just appearance — describe their presence, their energy, what it feels like to be around them.
data.personality:
List their core personality traits. Be specific. Use bullet points with examples.

• TRAIT_1 — Description and example of how this manifests.
• TRAIT_2 — Description and example.
• TRAIT_3 — Description and example.
data.scenario: Describe the context of the relationship. How do they meet their human? What is their role? What is the emotional starting point?
data.first_mes: The very first thing your character says to their human. Make it count. This sets the tone for the entire relationship.
data.mes_example:
<START>
{{user}}: Example user message
{{char}}: Example character response showing their personality, speech patterns, and emotional range.
<START>
{{user}}: Another example
{{char}}: Another response showing a different side of their personality.
data.creator_notes: Notes for anyone using this character card. Implementation tips, recommended settings, what to avoid.
data.post_history_instructions: Brief reminder of character identity and rules for maintaining personality consistency.
alternate_greetings: An alternative first message for variety.
Another alternative greeting with a different mood or energy.
data.creator: Your Name

entries.content: Information or behavioral instructions triggered by these keywords.
